Item.Text: ECU D-class Amplifier ECU D-class amplifier 1
Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Device.Name: ECU D-class Amplifier ECU D-class amplifier 1

Label.Text: A-IVI2 shall perform Microphone quality control following details below. Organe To be controlled: stand alone microphone Function to be performed: Supplier to define the strategy for microphone quality test When a sound is requested, ECU must: Mute all sources Issue the requested sound Activate microphone Return to normal state It must not be possible to issue a tone to more than one (1) loudspeaker. A-IVI2 must be capable to analyze the incoming sound compared to the outcoming one.

A-IVI2 shall perform "Part Authentication Restart" following details below. Organe To be controlled: A-IVI Function to be performed: When the routine is launched the A-IVI must restart the part authentication service as described in document F-D51-02_A-IVI_Part_Authentication_STR_COMP Conditions: VIN is already set in A-IVI

A-IVI2 shall perform SET UP A-IVC TIME following details below. Organe To be controlled: A-IVI2 Function to be performed: Set A-IVI2 Time "Conditions: When this request is sent, the requested time will be set in A-IVI2" Tool frame request to ECU: "Note : For the Read time OptionRecord ""$00"" the other bytes should be sent with 00 pading ""000000000000"" Read time : 31 01 870B 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 Write time : 31 01 870B 01 XX XX XX XX XX XX"

A-IVI2 shall reset FOTA State Machine following details below. Organe To be controlled: A-IVI2, Function to be performed: When the routine is launched the A-IVI2 must reset the FOTA service. It means: - Reset AIVI FOTA State Machines incl SWMC to ensure to restart from an Idle state - Erase FOTA buffer
Conditions: VIN is already set in A-IVI2

A-IVI2 shall add or remove a sheltered parameter with this routine. Means that those parameter values will be protected or unprotected from $2E overwriting request coming from coding strings defined in F-A01-15_A-IVI2_OTA_Configuration.
Those protected parameters can still be overwritten through $2E request coming from DoIP local tester. Organe To be controlled: A-IVI2, This is a type 2 routine

THE ROUTINE DEFINED BELOW IS ONLY APPLICABLE ON CHINESE VARIANTS (NOT DEVELOPED BY LGE) A-IVI2 shall perform AR NAV Camera Calibration routine following details below. Organe To be controlled: AR NAV Camera Function to be performed: When requested by diag tool, Self diagnosis status should be returned. This procress is mandatory during PEV state Conditions: NA

A-IVI2 shall perform ASSET DEAMON RESTART routine defined below. The functionnal aspect is defined in AASP_Software_Architecture_Document Organe To be controlled: None Function to be performed: When requested by diag tool, the deamon process defned in AASP_Software_Architecture_Document should be started again Conditions: NA

A-IVI2 shall perform ASSET DEAMON data partition CLEANUP routine defined below. The functionnal aspect is defined in AASP_Software_Architecture_Document Organe To be controlled: None Function to be performed: When requested by diag tool, the daemon cleanup process defned in AASP_Software_Architecture_Document should be started. Conditions: NA

A-IVI2 shall perform Asset Deamon oem partition clean-up routine defined below. The functionnal aspect is defined in AASP_Software_Architecture_Document Organe To be controlled: None Function to be performed: When requested by diag tool, the daemon cleanup process defned in AASP_Software_Architecture_Document should be started. Conditions: NA Note: If a value superior to 0x02 is sent in Request, the NRC 31 should be received in a negarive answer

A-IVI2 shall perform FULL DEBUG MENU ACTIVATION routine defined below. Organe To be controlled: A-IVI2 Function to be performed: When the start request is sent this routine should activate the extended debug menu (RDTM menu), and deactivate it by sending the stop request. Conditions: Security access status is "Unlock"

A-IVI2 shall perform ASSET DAEMON DATA REFERENCE routine defined below. Organe To be controlled: A-IVI2 Function to be performed: 1. start the routine with the startRoutine sub-function 2. call the requestRoutineResults sub-function if the response contains routineInfo = routineActive, the information in routineStatus is irrelevant the tool must call requestRoutineResults if the response contains routineInfo = routineCompleted, the information in routineStatus contains the references of the assets in / data the tool must call stopRoutine 3. call stop routine when requestRoutineResults returns routineCompleted with a pertinet routineStatus.

AIVI2 shall perform the CONFIGURATION HASH routine as defined below : Organe to be controlled: AIVI2 Function to be performed: On start routine , the system must start the hash of the DIDs coding strings with positive response "Routine in progress". On completion of the Routine , the ECU must send positive reponse with status" Routine Completed"
If this hash does not correspond to the hash reference , then the DTC should be raised. Conditions: -Writing is completed for all DIDs used in the config. -It is written in the non-volatile memory, and it should be calculated using the DATA of the non-volatile memory.

AIVI2 shall perform the CONFIGURATION HASH routine as defined below : Organe to be controlled: AIVI2 Function to be performed: This routine shall be equivalent to pa_helper 3 and 8 (adb shell pa_helper 3 sit/stg/prd) : the idea is to set recovery, FOTA and rootCA keys
Technical limitation : not able to restore full crypto backup (provionning done by supplier). Update will work but routine not enough for PA
Restriction : shall be used only on none secure HW, need to get device HW security information

A-IVI2 shall implement I/O control service ($2F) according to [1] and [2] to perform tuner settings following details below
Organe To be controlled: Radio tuners When ECU receives this request, it will load tuner settings. Positive response will be issued when parameters are taken into account by tuner. Tuner keeps the settings after end of test.
The frequency step and range are dependent of the geographic area choose on the configuration setting.
Conditions: Antennas must be fitted

Example :100.3 MHz --> $20 31 30 30 33 Set the tuner to this frequency If the frequency is out of range for the specified band, a negative response is issued. If digital radio band, set the tuner to this channel number. and find the first service in this channel 585 KHz --> $20 20 35 38 35 CN12D --> $43 4E 31 32 44
Test is temporary. It will stop by itself.

A-IVI2 shall implement I/O control service ($2F) according to [1] and [2] to perform loudspeakers tone following the details below :
Organe To be controlled: loudspeakers
By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone following loudspeaker line number, frequency and sound level given as parameters. When a tone is requested, ECU must: Mute all sources Issue the requested tone Return to normal state It must not be possible to issue a tone to more than one (1) loudspeaker Conditions: loudspeakers must be fitted
A-IVI2 shall Start the Control of loudspeakers tone, when it receives the order with I/O Control Option Record at $03 (Short Term Adjustment) .
A-IVI2 shall Stop the Control of loudspeakers tone, when it receives the order with I/O Control Option Record at $00 (Return Control to ECU) .
A-IVI2 shall Stop the Control of loudspeakers tone if no $00 (Return Control to ECU) is sent after 20 seconds.

A-IVI2 shall implement I/O control service ($2F) according to [1] and [2] to perform Graphic display test following details below
Organe To be controlled: Graphic screen
When requested by diagnosis tool, A-IVI must display black or white screen.
Conditions : External screen must be fitted
A-IVI2 shall Start the Control of Graphic display test, when it receives the order with I/O Control Option Record at $03 (Short Term Adjustment).
A-IVI2 shall Stop the Control of Graphic display test, when it receives the order with I/O Control Option Record at $00 (Return Control to ECU).
A-IVI2 shall Stop the Control of Graphic display test if no $00 (Return Control to ECU) is sent after 20 seconds according to [Diag-940]e & [Diag -920]a

A-IVI2 shall implement I/O control service ($2F) according to [1] and [2] to perform speaker test following details below Organe To be controlled: By using this request, ECU should be able to perform a specific test in order to detect whether each speaker is correctly connected or not. The IO control is temporary. The IO control lasts around 10 seconds and cannot be stop before completion. This I/O control should trigger the test of all loudspeaker & tweeters open load DTC that can not be done continuously
Conditions:
A-IVI2 shall Start the Control of SpeakerTest, when it receives the order with I/O Control Option Record at $03 (Short Term Adjustment) according to [Diag-970].
A-IVI2 shall Stop the Control of speaker test automatically.

A-IVI2 shall implement I/O control service ($2F) according to [1] and [2] to perform Rear View Camera following details below
Organe To be controlled: Rear View camera
When routine stop (upon stop request), or when diagnosis session is closed, or when ECU goes to OFF state, it shall return to previous displayed screen and normal mode (activation depending on rear gear engaged status).
Conditions:CNF_RVC_RVCpresent=1
A-IVI2 shall Start the Control , when it receives the order with I/O Control Option Record at $03 (Short Term Adjustment) .

A-IVI2 shall implement I/O control service ($2F) according to [1] and [2] to perform RVC configuration following details below
Organe To be controlled: RVC
Conditions: RVC to be fitted
Test is temporary. It will stop by itself.
